title: Ticket 02 - Export error, reporting path and safeguards
description: Dummy data for Ticket 02 - export error, reporting path and safeguards (V01) in the DoomScrollQuiz.
topics: Training operations export error reporting path safeguards

questions.prompt: In Ticket 02 the expert statement appears: "Classify and apply export error, reporting path and safeguards reliably in daily operations." What did he say?

options.text: We should clearly understand export error, reporting path and safeguards in daily work and implement it properly.
options.explanation: This summarizes the core idea directly and in a practical way.

options.text: We can ignore export error, reporting path and safeguards as long as there is no time pressure.
options.explanation: The topic should not be postponed or waited out.

options.text: Only team management is allowed to deal with export error, reporting path and safeguards.
options.explanation: That makes the topic unnecessarily exclusive and misses the learning goal.

options.text: Export error, reporting path and safeguards only become relevant after the project ends.
options.explanation: The learning goal must be applied in daily operations.

questions.prompt: Which response best fits Ticket 02 for export error, reporting path and safeguards?

options.text: Briefly align, document cleanly and make the next step clear.
options.explanation: This combines clarification, transparency and actionable execution.

options.text: Write nothing down at first and decide later by gut feeling.
options.explanation: That would be imprecise and risky here.

options.text: Only address problems once they have fully escalated.
options.explanation: The right direction is to clarify early rather than escalate late.

options.text: Avoid clarifying questions even when the goal is still unclear.
options.explanation: The learning goal demands clarity, not silent guessing.
